scripts.docker:humr-base:start: docker rm -f humr-base 2>/dev/null; docker run --name humr-base -p 8080:8080 humr-base
scripts.docker:code-guardian:build: pnpm docker:humr-base:build && docker build -t humr-code-guardian packages/code-guardian
scripts.docker:code-guardian:start: docker rm -f humr-code-guardian 2>/dev/null; docker run --name humr-code-guardian -p 3000:3000 humr-code-guardian
